meta.description: An identifiable single protest, march, demonstration, or civic mobilization. Includes organized marches, sit-ins, rallies, and any collective public action where citizens or groups demand attention to a cause. Distinct from blockades (which focus on road/service interruption) — protests are about the social/political demand itself. Each protest is a specific occurrence distinguishable by its location and date — not a trend or overview of social movements. Extracted from news articles and social media.

example.description: Hundreds of teachers marched from the central plaza to the government palace demanding salary increases.
example.context: The teachers' union has been in negotiations with the state government for three months without agreement.

date_range.mention: la manana del viernes, de 10am a 2pm

example.organizer: Sindicato Nacional de Trabajadores de la Educacion (SNTE)
example.route: de la Plaza Principal al Palacio de Gobierno
example.affected_services: trafico reducido en el centro historico durante 4 horas

event_type.description: Type of protest or civic mobilization. Choose the single most specific category that matches.

name.description: Name of the protest or movement, if it has one.

context.description: Contextual information: political background, prior negotiations, related protests.

relevance.description: Relevance within the article: 1 = main topic, 2 = secondary, 3 = implicit.

date_range.description: Date or date range of the protest. Extract the start datetime and, if present, the end datetime.

location.description: Location where the protest took place or is planned.

organizer.description: Group, union, organization, or movement that organized the protest.

participant_count.description: Estimated number of participants, with original text mention and numeric estimate.

demand.description: What the protesters are demanding or the cause they are supporting.

route.description: March route, if mentioned (e.g. 'de la Plaza Principal al Palacio de Gobierno').

affected_services.description: Description of traffic, transit, or services affected by the protest.

authorities_response.description: Response from authorities (police presence, negotiations, statements), if mentioned.

incidents.description: Any incidents during the protest (clashes, arrests, injuries), if mentioned.
